selected_issue.issue: Automation branch-name contract mismatch in automation/README.md
selected_issue.title: README prescribed agent/run naming while active fast-lane contract requires fast/run-YYYYMMDD-HHMM-short-slug

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence on agent-base showed no unresolved rank 1-6 issues: canonical tests passed, replay assessment reported zero structural/behavioral/invariant totals, no replay-mode mismatches, and no active diagnostics completeness blocker. The highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 7 documentation/contract consistency in automation/README.md branch naming.

files_changed.change: Updated run-branch naming format and example from agent/run-* to fast/run-YYYYMMDD-HHMM-short-slug.

before_after_evidence.before: automation/README.md specified agent/run-YYYYMMDD-issue-slug, conflicting with active fast-lane branch/report template contract.
before_after_evidence.after: automation/README.md now specifies fast/run-YYYYMMDD-HHMM-short-slug with an aligned fast-lane example.

unresolved_risks: Other non-canonical docs still reference agent/run-* naming outside the selected issue scope.
This is a documentation alignment change and does not add code-enforced branch-name validation.
stop_reason: Selected rank-7 documentation contract mismatch was fixed with a minimal single-file code change and validated; further documentation harmonization was outside this single-issue bounded run.
